# Frogy 2.0 — comprehensive port specification for naabu
# ~500 ports covering: web, database, remote access, management, cloud/container,
# messaging, email, file-sharing, IoT, and high-numbered service ports.
# Ranges use dash notation (e.g. 21-23). Comments start with #.

# ── Standard services ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
